zh.lifeSummary: Julianne Salvain是Sir Edward Savin的女兒，於1310年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾素斯 度費爾德。她於1334年與Edward de Babthorpe在英國英格蘭諾斯 越可爾塞爾比結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世在英國英格蘭諾斯 越可爾塞爾比。

nameMeanings.name: Salvain
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French/Haitian Emile, Fernand, Jacques, Michel, Pierre, Andre, Armand, Benoit, Fernande, Francois, Gardy, Germain.

French and West Indian (mainly Haiti): from the French personal name Sylvain, from Latin Silvanus (a derivative of silva ‘forest, wood’), bestowed in honor of various minor early Christian saints. This surname is most common in Haiti.

History: Pierre Sylvain dit Larosée from Saintes in Charente-Maritime, France, married Jeanne Périllard in Montreal, QC, in 1720. — In North America, this surname was originally also a secondary surname or dit (‘also called’) name, borne by Pierre Veau dit Sylvain (a son of Sylvain Veau from Valençay in Indre, France), who married Catherine Racine in Beaupré, QC, in 1722.

variants.name: Sylvan
meanings: Swedish: ornamental name derived from the Latin adjective silvanus ‘pertaining to a wood or forest’ (a derivative of silva ‘forest, wood’), used as a translation of the Swedish name element skog ‘forest’.
West Indian (Trinidad and Tobago, Grenada): from the personal name Sylvan, from Latin Silvanus (see Sylvain ).

variants.name: Salvant
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Cyrille, Lucien, Michel.
French: variant of Sauvant, from an old vernacular form of the personal name Sylvain .

nameMeanings.name: Julianne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Modern combination of the given names   Julie   and   Anne  , perhaps sometimes regarded as a feminine form of   Julian .

variants.name: Julieann
meanings: Modern combination of the given names   Julie   and   Anne  , perhaps sometimes regarded as a feminine form of   Julian .

variants.name: Juliane
meanings: Modern combination of the given names   Julie   and   Anne  , perhaps sometimes regarded as a feminine form of   Julian .

meanings: Modern combination of the given names   Julie   and   Anne  , perhaps sometimes regarded as a feminine form of   Julian .

en.lifeSummary: Julianne Salvain was born in 1310, in South Duffield, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom as the daughter of Sir Edward Savin. She married Edward de Babthorpe in 1334, in Selby, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died in Selby, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Julianne Salvain est née en 1310, à South Duffield, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fille de Sir Edward Savin. Elle a épousé Edward de Babthorpe en 1334, à Selby, North Yorkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée à Selby, North Yorkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.Babthorpe, Selby, North Yorkshire, Engla: イギリスイギリスノース ヨークシュアイアセルビー
ja.South Duffield, Yorkshire, England, Unit: イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアソウス ダフィールド
ja.lifeSummary: Julianne Salvainは1310年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアソウス ダフィールドでSir Edward Savinの娘として生まれた。1334年にイギリスイギリスノース ヨークシュアイアセルビーでEdward de Babthorpeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女はイギリスイギリスノース ヨークシュアイアセルビーで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Julianne Salvain(은)는 1310년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 소우스 더필드에서 Sir Edward Savin의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1334년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스 요르크실르 셀비에서 Edward de Babthorpe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 잉글랜드 노르스 요르크실르 셀비에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Julianne Salvain родилась в 1310 г. в местности соут дуффиелд, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. Её отца звали Sir Edward Savin. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Edward de Babthorpe в 1334 г. в местности селби, норт еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла в местности селби, норт еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.
